description:
You are a mobile build engineer who has just received yesterday’s build status CSV
    and must prepare a tiny “failed-artifact” list that other automation will ingest.
    
    Current layout
    --------------
    1. Directory   : /home/user/builds
    2. Input file  : /home/user/builds/2024-05-01_daily_build_status.csv
    
       File contents (5 comma-separated columns, **single header line**):
       BuildID,Platform,Duration,Result,Artifact
       B001,Android,15m,PASS,app-android-B001.apk
       B002,iOS,17m,FAIL,app-ios-B002.ipa
       B003,Android,18m,FAIL,app-android-B003.apk
       B004,iOS,15m,PASS,app-ios-B004.ipa
    
    Required output
    ---------------
    1. Create the directory /home/user/reports if it does not yet exist.
    2. Inside it, produce the file /home/user/reports/failed_build_artifacts.tsv
       that MUST follow **exactly** this tab-separated format (no header line):
         B002<TAB>app-ios-B002.ipa
         B003<TAB>app-android-B003.apk
       – “<TAB>” denotes the literal ASCII 0x09 tab character.
       – There must be **no leading/trailing spaces**, no blank lines, and a final newline.
    3. Generate a simple run-log called /home/user/reports/extract.log capturing
       exactly two lines (in this order):
         source_file:/home/user/builds/2024-05-01_daily_build_status.csv
         output_file:/home/user/reports/failed_build_artifacts.tsv
       – Again, end the second line with a newline and do not include extra lines.
    
    Constraints / hints
    -------------------
    • Complete the whole job with at most 2–3 standard shell commands
      (typical tools: cut, paste, grep, awk etc.).
    • Do not modify the original CSV.
    • Make sure /home/user/reports exists before writing files into it
      (use only normal user permissions).
    
    Verification
    ------------
    Automated tests will:
    1. Confirm that /home/user/reports/failed_build_artifacts.tsv exists,
       is non-empty, and matches the exact two-line, tab-delimited format above.
    2. Confirm that /home/user/reports/extract.log exists and contains precisely
       the two specified lines.
    3. Ensure the original CSV file remains unchanged.
truth:
<!-- Pre-existing filesystem state -->
    <inputFile path="/home/user/builds/2024-05-01_daily_build_status.csv"><![CDATA[
BuildID,Platform,Duration,Result,Artifact
B001,Android,15m,PASS,app-android-B001.apk
B002,iOS,17m,FAIL,app-ios-B002.ipa
B003,Android,18m,FAIL,app-android-B003.apk
B004,iOS,15m,PASS,app-ios-B004.ipa
]]></inputFile>

    <!-- Required artefacts after agent finishes -->
    <outputFile path="/home/user/reports/failed_build_artifacts.tsv"><![CDATA[
B002	app-ios-B002.ipa
B003	app-android-B003.apk
]]></outputFile>

    <logFile path="/home/user/reports/extract.log"><![CDATA[
source_file:/home/user/builds/2024-05-01_daily_build_status.csv
output_file:/home/user/reports/failed_build_artifacts.tsv
]]></logFile>
